arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim ‘really confident’ in Man U keeper Andre Onana despite Lyon errors
arts.sum: Onana had a night to forget as United drew 2-2 in their Europa League quarter-final first leg.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim admits ‘there is nothing to say’ to help Andre Onana after costly goalkeeping errors
arts.sum: The 29-year-old was at fault for both goals against Lyon with Paul Scholes labelling his mistakes as ‘awful’

arts.ttl: Man United 'make contact' over £60m goalkeeper signing as Ruben Amorim reacts to Andre Onana howlers
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly make contact over a summer deal for a Premier League goalkeeper in the wake of Andre Onana's latest horror show.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim responds to Andre Onana drop calls after costly Man Utd errors
arts.sum: Andre Onana made errors for both of Lyon's goals as Manchester United were forced to settle for a 2-2 draw in their Europa League quarter-final first leg, having conceded in the 95th minute

arts.ttl: Ruben: We had to adapt to Lyon
arts.sum: We have a Premier League game on Sunday against a top team and then we have time to think about the second leg.” Our fans want us to press all the time and this is a team that is really smart, that try to push us, to use the space behind.

arts.ttl: Manchester United coach Ruben Amorim explains giving Andre Onana silent treatment after blunders
arts.sum: Andre Onana had another night to forget for Man United in Lyon, where he was blameworthy for both goals they conceded.

arts.ttl: Paul Scholes believes Ruben Amorim isn't telling truth in Man Utd post-match interviews
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Ruben Amorim saw his side draw 2-2 in the first leg of their Europa League quarter-final at Lyon after two errors from goalkeeper Andre Onana

arts.ttl: Manchester United: Ruben Amorim confirms Andre Onana decision after costly mistakes in Lyon draw
arts.sum: Amorim continues to back Onana as he suffers through a difficult season

arts.ttl: Leny Yoro reveals how Manchester United dressing room reacted to late Lyon equaliser
arts.sum: Man United goalkeeper Andre Onana dropped two clangers as the Reds were denied a victory against Lyon in the Europa League.

arts.ttl: Lyon 2-2 Man Utd: Match report & 4 talking points as Red Devils rue late equaliser
arts.sum: Manchester United were left ruing a late equaliser conceded against Lyon on Thursday night, having been on course to take an aggregate lead back to Old Trafford next week.
